responsibilities: Scheduled ingestion, drift, and analysis jobs

modules.name: auth
modules.purpose: OAuth 2.0/OIDC Resource Server signature, algorithm, issuer, and scope validations

modules.name: tenancy
modules.purpose: Strict tenant isolation via verified JWT claim context and PostgreSQL Row-Level Security (RLS) enforcement

modules.name: matches
modules.purpose: Maintains sports matches, lifecycle states, and participant info with strict transition rules

modules.name: providers
modules.purpose: Maintains data provider definitions, capabilities, rate limits, and ingestion jobs with a solid fail-closed mode

modules.name: odds
modules.purpose: Ingests and normalizes bookmaker odds quotes, validating odds value ranges (>1) and structural coherence

modules.name: analysis
modules.purpose: Builds point-in-time analytical features, executes versioned prediction models with time-aware walks, calculates no-vig market probabilities

modules.name: advice
modules.purpose: Advice engine that evaluates expectation edge/uncertainty gates, creating RECOMMENDED, REJECTED, or ABSTAINED advice with full audit provenance

modules.name: coupons
modules.purpose: Optimizer that builds manual CouponDraft objects based on calibrated advice, expectations, same-event dependencies, and concentration thresholds

modules.name: audit
modules.purpose: Auditable log vault tracking tenant/principal activities, feature calculations, and model updates

modules.name: outbox
modules.purpose: Transactional outbox pattern with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED batch claiming and exponential backoff

modules.name: shared
modules.purpose: Common helpers, domain Result objects, UUID utilities, and client factories for AWS (S3, SQS), Redis, and database pools
